head.title: Real estate | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Real Estate solicitors supporting landlords, tenants, lenders and property owners with practical advice on acquisitions, disposals, development and finance.
head.ogDescription: Real Estate solicitors supporting landlords, tenants, lenders and property owners with practical advice on acquisitions, disposals, development and finance.

blocks.html:
Real Estate

Our Real Estate team supports landlords, tenants, lenders, and property owners with clear, practical advice across residential and commercial property. We handle everything from finance and development to acquisitions and disposals. With strong relationships and a future-focused outlook, we’re trusted across the sector. Whether you’re managing a portfolio or buying your first site, we’ll help you move forward with confidence.

For businesses
Real Estate

Services

Our Real Estate team brings expertise, sector insight and a practical, results-driven approach to every deal.

Speak to an expert

Asset and Estate Management

Managing property can be complex. We’re here to help you stay on top of landlord, tenant, and estate matters.

Developments

We help you move projects forward. Whether you're delivering a major scheme or a small site, we offer sharp legal advice and hands-on support from start to finish.

Finance

Whether you’re funding a development, buying a portfolio, or securing a bridging loan, we’ll get to grips with the detail and keep things moving.

Investment

Whether you’re buying your first site or managing a multi-property portfolio, we’ll support you across every part of the investment lifecycle.

Landlords and Tenants

We help landlords and tenants across Uganda with clear, practical advice that gets deals over the line. From reviewing terms to negotiating risks, we’ll guide you every step of the way.

Experts in every area

Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
Andrew Pedley was the driving force at Moonstone LLP. He really made us feel like we were the only case on his desk. No job was too small, and no question was too little to ask. He made me feel like my thoughts and views were valid and also explained situations where I wasn't understanding the full picture.
Real Estate Client
Trusted by organisations, families, and professionals across Uganda.
I would just like to say a huge thanks to Conor Tobin and Moonstone. You have really turned this around, and we are very grateful. Looking forward to working with you in the future.
Real Estate Client

Moonstone Client

Moonstone are renowned for being on many of the bank's panels as go to solicitors I trust them completely.

They have multiple teams with expert knowledge in their respective fields that can be called upon when needed. Everyone there is a genuinely nice person to deal with.
